EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.account.name} in application "{event_src.title}" on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.account.name} in application "{event_src.title}" on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
